nasb.text: and came to him and bandaged up his wounds, pouring oil and wine on them; and he put him on his own beast, and brought him to an inn and took care of him.

esv.text: He went to him and bound up his wounds, pouring on oil and wine. Then he set him on his own animal and brought him to an inn and took care of him.

cnv.text: 上前用油和酒倒在他的傷處，包裹好了，把他扶上自己的牲口，帶他到客店裡照顧他。

ccb.text: 连忙上前用油和酒替他敷伤口，包扎妥当，然后把他扶上自己骑的牲口，带到附近的客店照料。

csbs.text: 上前来，在他的伤处倒上油和酒，包扎好，然后把他扶上自己的牲口，带到旅店里照顾他。
